start.speaker: Merchant
start.text: Step closer, pilgrim! Everyone who is anyone owns one. A small price — only a little of your heart. Will you buy?

text_variants.text: You look at my wares with clear eyes — that won't do. Come, surely even the discerning deserve one fine thing. Will you buy?
text_variants.text_zh: 你用清明的眼打量我的货——这可不行。来嘛，纵是明辨之人，也该配一件好东西。买不买？

text_variants.text: Ah, a person of taste and standing! This was made for one such as you. Will you buy?
text_variants.text_zh: 啊，有品味、有身份的人！这正是为您这般人所造的。买不买？

choices.text: Buy it. Surely one small indulgence won't cost me much.
choices.text_zh: 买下吧。区区一点放纵，想必花不了我多少。

choices.text: No. My peace is not for sale at this fair.
choices.text_zh: 不。我的平安不在这集市上出售。

start.text_zh: 走近些，朝圣者！但凡有头有脸的都备着一件。价钱不高——不过你心的一点点。买不买？

bought.speaker: Merchant
bought.text: A wise purchase! Wear it well... it suits the crowd, if not the road.

choices.text: (Turn away, the bauble already heavier than it looked.)
choices.text_zh: （转身离开，那玩意儿已比看上去更沉。）

bought.text_zh: 明智之选！好好戴着……它配得上人群，纵然配不上这条路。

refused.speaker: Merchant
refused.text: Suit yourself. The narrow-eyed never could enjoy a good fair.
refused.text_zh: 随你便。眯着眼的人，从来就享受不了一场好集市。
